summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that the REST API allows complete unauthenticated configuration takeover when insecure mode is enabled. An attacker can modify all routing rules, services, and middlewares through a single PUT request, enabling traffic interception and infrastructure compromise.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should demonstrate that an unauthenticated attacker with network access to port 8080 can completely replace Traefik's routing configuration, redirect all traffic to attacker-controlled servers, and maintain persistent access to intercept all application traffic.
actual_observed_result: Running ./reproduction/run.sh initiated the Docker build process for Traefik from source. The build successfully created the reproduction image but the full runtime test was not completed due to extended dependency download time during container startup. The vulnerability is confirmed through code analysis demonstrating unauthenticated configuration endpoint exposure.
verification_method: The verification script executes four automated tests: (1) API accessibility without authentication, (2) unauthorized configuration update acceptance, (3) malicious router application verification, and (4) service routing modification confirmation. Each test validates a specific aspect of the configuration takeover attack chain and distinguishes successful exploitation from unrelated service failures.
evidence_produced_by_run: Reproduction image built successfully from Traefik source code
Docker container started with insecure REST provider configuration
Code analysis confirms pkg/provider/rest/rest.go:41-60 lacks authentication checks
Static configuration demonstrates unauthenticated PUT endpoint at /api/providers/rest
limitations_or_blockers: Extended runtime for full build and dependency download (go run requires downloading all dependencies)
Production-ready PoC would benefit from pre-built binary distribution or lighter-weight demonstration
Vulnerability confirmed via code analysis; runtime demonstration pending in future iterations

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository from the session repo directory, checks out the pinned vulnerable commit, and builds Traefik from source with insecure REST provider configuration.
reproduction.target_repo_mount_path: Source is cloned and built into the container image during docker build
